title: aBTV Modpack
description: A medieval modpack, made for detailed medieval graphics.
body:
Improve your Minecraft gameplay with aBTV, a texture pack designed to bring a medieval theme to your world. aBTV combines detailed medieval textures with modern features like **RTX ray tracing** and **Parallax Occlusion Mapping (POM)** to create realistic gameplay. Whether you enjoy building castles or exploring villages, aBTV offers a simple way to add historical charm and visual quality to your game.

<iframe style="display: table; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/zIM-7bERIL0?si=z5eZNn6Ss57OVA-L&autoplay=1&mute=1" width="560" height="314" allowfullscreen="allowfullscreen"></iframe>

## Features

### Medieval Theme

aBTV provides textures inspired by history, recreating the look of the medieval period in Minecraft. This makes it perfect for players who want to build castles, villages, or other historical settings.

### RTX Support

With RTX support, aBTV enhances your game’s lighting to make it look more natural. You’ll see effects like sunlight shining through leaves or torches casting lifelike shadows. These improvements add depth and make your Minecraft world feel more alive.

### POM with Shaders

aBTV uses Parallax Occlusion Mapping (POM) to give textures a 3D appearance without slowing down your game. Surfaces like stone, wood, and cobblestone gain extra detail and realism. Using aBTV with shaders like **BSL** or **Complementary Shaders** creates a smooth and clean experience.

### Easy Installation

aBTV comes as a **Fabric modpack** with shaders already set up, so you can start playing quickly. No extra steps are needed—just download and launch. This straightforward process lets you focus on enjoying the game.

## Why Choose a Medieval Theme?

A medieval theme mixes historical detail with creative options, appealing to many Minecraft players. It’s great for building forts, acting out knightly adventures, or designing kingdoms. With aBTV, your projects look real and stand out, thanks to modern visual effects that highlight every detail.

## User Testimonials

Here’s feedback from players:

- *“The aBTV texture pack has greatly improved my Minecraft gameplay. The medieval textures are clear and immersive, and RTX makes everything more realistic.”*
- *“Installation was very easy, and the POM effect with shaders looks amazing.”*

## Comparison with Other Packs

Many medieval texture packs exist, but aBTV stands out with **RTX support** and **POM**. Unlike packs that only use detailed images, aBTV uses shader technology to create a realistic feel while keeping your game running smoothly. This balance of beauty and performance makes it a strong choice for players.

## FAQ

### Does aBTV work with other mods?

aBTV works with most Fabric mods, though results may differ based on the mod. Test it to check for texture issues.

### Can I use aBTV without shaders?

Yes, but we suggest using the included shaders to get the full effect of POM and RTX.

## Conclusion

Try aBTV to enjoy better visuals and a historical feel in Minecraft. With its medieval textures, modern features like RTX and POM, and easy setup, aBTV is perfect for players wanting to improve their game.
